articles.title: Tamil Nadu Assembly Erupts After CM Vijay's Blistering Speech Against DMK & AIADMK | News18
articles.description: A heated political confrontation unfolded in the Tamil Nadu Assembly as Chief Minister Vijay launched a blistering attack on both the DMK and AIADMK during his address. His sharp remarks triggered strong reactions from opposition members, leading to loud protests, heated exchanges, and scenes of chaos inside the House. The dramatic session highlighted the intensifying political battle in Tamil Nadu as parties gear up for future electoral contests. n18oc_breaking-newsNews18 Mobile App - https://onelink.to/desc-youtube

articles.title: US proposes 75% hike in citizenship application
articles.description: The US Department of Homeland Security (DHS) has proposed a major increase in filing fees for naturalisation applications, including a rise in the cost of Form N-400. The proposal, published ahead of its Federal Register notice, suggests raising the fee from $760 to $1,330, marking a 75% increase. The plan also removes reduced-fee options and fee waivers for eligible applicants, according to the proposal.Fee structure revision under review According to the DHS proposal, the revised fee structure aims to align application charges with the cost of processing immigration cases. The changes also extend to other related filings, including Form N-336, which is used to request a hearing after a naturalisation denial. The fee for this form would rise to $1,475 from $830.READ MORE: New US visa rule could change how long international students can stay in the countryThe proposal also eliminates existing financial relief measures. These include the reduced-fee option for applicants earning below 400% of the federal poverty guidelines and all fee waiver provisions linked to Form N-400 and Form N-336. The department said the revision is intended to reflect adjudication costs across the immigration system.Public consultation process begins DHS has clarified that the proposed fee changes are not yet final and will not affect current applicants immediately. The rule must first complete the federal rulemaking process, including a public consultation period.READ MORE: US Visa Bulletin July 2026: Latest update brings bad news for Indians on the Green Card queueUSCIS will accept public feedback for 60 days after the proposal is published in the Federal Register. Final decisions will be made after reviewing stakeholder responses. Under the current system, applicants continue to pay existing fees until any new rule is formally adopted and implemented.

articles.title: DMK MLAs Stage A Walkout As A Mark Of Protest During CM Vijay’s speech | Tamil Nadu Assembly |News18
articles.description: A dramatic scene unfolded in the Tamil Nadu Assembly as DMK MLAs staged a walkout during Chief Minister Vijay's speech, triggering a fresh political storm in the state. The protest, which took place amid heated exchanges inside the House, has intensified the political rivalry between the ruling government and the opposition. As CM Vijay addressed key issues ranging from governance to policy decisions, DMK legislators chose to leave the Assembly in protest, alleging that their concerns were not being adequately addressed. n18oc_breaking-newsNews18 Mobile App - https://onelink.to/desc-youtube

articles.title: 'Checked Trump's SM before coming here’: Ambassador Huckabee's quip leaves room in stitches
articles.description: US Ambassador to Israel Mike Huckabee joked on Sunday that he checked President Donald Trump's social media accounts before delivering a speech in Jerusalem to ensure he had not been dismissed overnight.Speaking at the JNS International Policy Summit, Huckabee took a light-hearted swipe at Trump's tendency to announce personnel decisions through social media posts.'So today, before I got here, I did something that I thought was very important. I checked President Trump's social media to make sure this was not my last speech in Israel,' Huckabee said.
